the features this system has it is
packed with a variety of features
whether you're a carplay iPhone user or
an Android auto Android User thank you
so much for watching our video and we'll
catch you in the next one

### Choose the suitable model for your ES

The LEX ES have 2 version ,some model come with factory AMP and need to use a fiber converter.

Please check above picture clearly and choose the correct model for your car .

Wrong model will make stereo no sound .

If you have version B please check with us to buy Fiber convertor.

![Sound](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/e14148d3-d69a-4a74-b926-663ebe873b1e.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Sound Adjustment

Sound location optimize System

![Dual USB](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/6aedc02f-6e52-4b3d-9d77-ef72b67fe4d0.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Dual USB ports

Support 2 USB ports at the same time . Connect flash drive for one and connect to phone the other one.

![Carplay](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/113f35b7-d736-4254-8b3b-83e22cd0f043.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Wireless Carplay

Build in wireless Carplay

Build in wired Android Auto.

![IPS screen](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/47ef9ac2-0281-4d81-a09a-975e401ec541.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### IPS Screen

IPS screen with unique pixel array have good view angel .

Won't face color faded in driver side nor passenger side.

![Plug and play](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/6a08627d-4da8-4f91-b33f-0b8399bc933a.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Plug and Play

All harness designed match to your original car harness .plug into correct harness the radio will play.

Be noticed in some model we have provide more than 1 set of wire harness to fit different version of your car.

![DSP](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/9ceb38c9-82ab-492c-9f36-1d9fc1e4e0b9.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Eaualizer

Support 32steps of DPS Eaualizer Adjustments always can find your favorite sound performance.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

### Customers say

Customers find the navigation system works well and appreciate its plug-and-play installation, with one customer noting all steering wheel functions are operational. The device receives positive feedback for its appearance, screen quality, and upgrade capabilities, with one customer highlighting its crystal clear reception and another noting the huge display. While some customers say it fits their vehicles perfectly, others report installation issues, and opinions about ease of use are mixed. The connectivity features also receive mixed reviews.

I recommend using wired connection for CarPlay to minimize lag. Overall good unit!

Dzxiaso Stereo boasts a vibrant, 12-inch touchscreen that looks like it belongs in a much newer car. The installation was surprisingly straightforward, thanks to the plug-and-play wiring harnesses that were included.



The Android operating system is incredibly intuitive. Navigating through menus, launching apps, and customizing the home screen is a breeze. Having access to the Google Play Store directly in my car is fantastic. I loaded up my favorite navigation apps, i.e., Waze and Google Maps, and music streaming services such as YouTube Music and numerous handy utility apps.



The sound quality is a significant improvement over the stock system. The audio enhancements, like EQ settings, amplifier outputs, etc. really bring my music to life. Calls are crystal clear thanks to the included microphone. I was also pleased to find that all my steering wheel controls integrated seamlessly with the new unit.



Beyond the core features, this stereo has some other impressive perks such as backup camera integration, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto compatibility, Bluetooth connectivity, responsiveness of the touchscreen, etc. For example,



Minor drawbacks were lack of clear installation documentation in case of an installation hiccup, and the backup camera was a pain to wire as the instructions were not clear however, I emailed support and they responded timely, These minor issues are far outweighed by the massive benefits this stereo brings to your Lexus ES350
